title: Punch Off
description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes:
Choosing [gold]Nab[/gold] adds the [red]Injury[/red] curse to your deck (with a screen shake — you get clocked in the face), then offers a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

Choosing [gold]I Can Take Them[/gold] advances to a second page; pressing [gold]Fight[/gold] starts combat against two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] with rewards of a random [gold]Relic[/gold] and a random [gold]Potion[/gold]. The fight does not resume the event after combat.
